title: AI-Powered Healthcare Diagnosis System
description: Development of an AI system for early diagnosis of cardiovascular diseases using medical imaging and patient data.
outcomes: Published 5 research papers in top-tier journals
Filed 2 patents for the diagnostic algorithms

title: Smart City Traffic Management
description: Collaborative project with city administration to develop intelligent traffic management system using IoT and ML.

title: Natural Language Processing for Indian Languages
description: Research project focused on developing NLP tools and resources for low-resource Indian languages.
outcomes: Developed translation models with BLEU score > 35

title: Precision Agriculture using Drone Technology
description: Partnership with agricultural department to develop drone-based crop monitoring and yield prediction system.
outcomes: Increased crop yield by 25% in pilot farms
Expanded to 10 districts across the state

title: Quantum Machine Learning for Drug Discovery
description: Exploring quantum computing applications in machine learning for accelerated drug discovery and molecular design.

title: Federated Learning for Privacy-Preserving Healthcare
description: Developing federated learning frameworks for healthcare data analysis while preserving patient privacy.

title: AI for Climate Change Prediction
description: Using advanced AI models to predict climate patterns and assess environmental impact for policy making.

description: Creating transparent and traceable supply chain solutions using blockchain technology and IoT sensors.

title: Explainable AI for Financial Services
description: Developing interpretable machine learning models for financial risk assessment and regulatory compliance.

title: Multimodal data representation using deep learning
